English: Instant, Private, and Seamless File Sharing. Upload files on one device, scan a QR code, and download them on another. No accounts, no tracking, just transfer. Features: QR code pairing for instant sharing; files encrypted at rest on server; sessions auto-expire (1 min to 24 hours); send and receive modes; supports all file types up to 200 MB; zero accounts required; downloads save directly to your Downloads folder; native Windows desktop app with Edge WebView2.
QR code pairing for instant sharing

Upload dist\filecp.msix directly to Partner Center. MSIX is the recommended format — it automatically handles silent install, Add/Remove Programs registration, and code signing (Microsoft re-signs during ingestion).

Upload filecp_setup.exe to a public URL and provide it as Package URL. Silent install params: /VERYSILENT /SUPPRESSMSGBOXES /NORESTART. REQUIRES a CA-trusted SHA256 code signing certificate (self-signed is NOT accepted for EXE submissions).
